name: Ley Nº 184/17 - Establece el Sistema Nacional de Atención a Emergencias y Seguridad 9-1-1.
Protocol to Multilateral Agreement on cooperation in the sphere of prevention of natural and technological disasters and mitigation of the consequences thereof.
jur: Russian Federation; Armenia; Azerbaijan; Belarus; Kazakhstan; Kyrgyzstan; Republic of Moldova; Tajikistan; Turkmenistan; Ukraine; Uzbekistan
